subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The Book of God hath appeared unveiled and unconcealed, manifest and vocal, and this Most Great Book was heralded in the Qur'án [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی کتاب الهی من غیر ستر و حجاب ظاهر و ناطق و این کتاب اعظم در فرقان بام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
